message:
feat(profiling): expand pane profiling scripts and hotspot capture docs

Extend scripts/pane_profile.sh (+40 lines) with additional profiling
modes and measurement collection. Update hotspot capture documentation
with refined methodology. Sync beads tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,6 +26,7 @@ Artifacts produced by the latest run:
 - `target/pane-profiling/bd-1y0ph/layout_bench.perfstat.txt`
 - `target/pane-profiling/bd-1y0ph/pane_terminal_bench.perfstat.txt`
 - `target/pane-profiling/bd-1y0ph/pane_pointer_bench.perfstat.txt`
+- `target/pane-profiling/bd-1y0ph/symbol_metadata.txt`
 
 All targeted probes passed in the latest test-mode capture.
 
@@ -121,7 +122,8 @@ Interpretation:
 `kernel.perf_event_paranoid` to `1`, so counter-based profiling is now part of
 the repeatable capture workflow.
 
-The current bench binaries are still stripped, which means `perf report` stack
-attribution is not yet high quality even though `perf stat` counters are fully
-usable. The next `bd-1y0ph` slice should focus on getting symbol-rich bench
-artifacts locally so call-stack profiles become actionable too.
+Bench binaries are now built from a bench profile that preserves debug info, and
+the profiling runner emits `symbol_metadata.txt` so each capture bundle records
+the exact bench binary paths plus whether `.debug_info` is present. That turns
+symbol-readiness from an assumption into an auditable artifact and makes future
+`perf report` investigations easier to trust.

@@ -133,6 +133,43 @@ run_perf_stat() {
         --noplot
 }
 
+record_symbol_metadata() {
+    local output_file="${OUT_DIR}/symbol_metadata.txt"
+    local prefixes=(
+        layout_bench
+        pane_terminal_bench
+        pane_pointer_bench
+    )
+
+    : > "$output_file"
+    {
+        echo "Pane bench symbol metadata"
+        echo "Generated by: ${0##*/}"
+        echo
+    } >> "$output_file"
+
+    for prefix in "${prefixes[@]}"; do
+        local binary
+        binary="$(find_bench_binary "$prefix")"
+
+        {
+            echo "== ${prefix} =="
+            echo "binary=${binary}"
+            file "$binary"
+            if command -v readelf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+                if readelf -S "$binary" | grep -q '\.debug_info'; then
+                    echo "debug_info=present"
+                else
+                    echo "debug_info=missing"
+                fi
+            else
+                echo "debug_info=unknown (readelf unavailable)"
+            fi
+            echo
+        } >> "$output_file"
+    done
+}
+
 run_bench \
     layout_bench \
     bench -p ftui-layout --bench layout_bench -- pane/core/ "${bench_args[@]}"
@@ -162,6 +199,8 @@ if [[ "$PERF_STAT" == "true" ]]; then
         "pane/web_pointer/lifecycle/down_ack_move_120_up"
 fi
 
+record_symbol_metadata
+
 cat > "${OUT_DIR}/README.txt" <<EOF
 Pane profiling artifacts for bd-1y0ph.
 
@@ -171,6 +210,7 @@ Files:
 - pane_pointer_bench.txt    pane/web_pointer/* Criterion output
 - *.time.txt                optional /usr/bin/time -v resource summaries
 - *.perfstat.txt            optional perf stat counter summaries
+- symbol_metadata.txt       bench-binary paths + debug-info readiness
 
 Runner:
 - ${0##*/}
